zh.title: 马克·吐温预言全集 - 美国文豪的惊人预见 | Mark Twain Prophecies
zh.description: 美国作家马克·吐温（1835-1910）不仅是文学巨匠，还留下了多项惊人预言：预言自己随哈雷彗星而去、在小说中预见互联网、对帝国主义与人性的深刻洞察至今仍具预见性。

en.title: Mark Twain Prophecies - Remarkable Predictions from America's Greatest Writer | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Mark Twain (1835-1910), America's greatest writer, left behind remarkable predictions: his own death tied to Halley's Comet, the internet foreseen in fiction, and observations on imperialism and human nature that remain prescient today.
